mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record ( animal_id, animal_name, hospital_name, doctor_name, diagnosis, treatment, cost, treatment_date, status ) VALUES ( #{animalId}, #{animalName}, #{hospitalName}, #{doctorName}, #{diagnosis}, #{treatment}, #{cost}, #{treatmentDate}, #{status} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM medical_record WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE medical_record
animal_id = #{animalId},
animal_name = #{animalName},
hospital_name = #{hospitalName},
doctor_name = #{doctorName},
diagnosis = #{diagnosis},
treatment = #{treatment},
cost = #{cost},
treatment_date = #{treatmentDate},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, animal_id AS animalId, animal_name AS animalName, hospital_name AS hospitalName, doctor_name AS doctorName, diagnosis, treatment, cost, treatment_date AS treatmentDate, status, is_deleted AS isDeleted, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM medical_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medical_record
is_deleted = 0
AND animal_id = #{animalId}
AND animal_name LIKE concat('%', #{animalName}, '%')
AND hospital_name LIKE concat('%', #{hospitalName}, '%')
AND doctor_name LIKE concat('%', #{doctorName}, '%')
AND diagnosis LIKE concat('%', #{diagnosis}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
